name: Entra Stale Active Accounts (180 days)
description: Detects long-dormant active entra accounts with no recent login activity for 180 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_sign_in_datetime AS last_login FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL OR u.last_sign_in_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Immediately disable long-dormant accounts and require formal reactivation approval for reinstatement.
